whatsTrending.title: Char Dham package 9N/10D
whatsTrending.subtitle: feel the religious vibes with our exclusive group packages!
whatsTrending.description: The Char Dham Yatra is one of the most sacred Hindu pilgrimages in India, undertaken through the Himalayan regions of Uttarakhand. Our itinerary follows the traditional route sequence and avoids rushed travel or unsafe same-day long drives.

atGlance.subHeading: Char Dham Yatra at a Glance

whoWeAre.heading: Crafting Spiritual Journeys Since [2015]
whoWeAre.intro: Yugen India Travel is a growing, experience-driven travel organisation dedicated to spiritual and pilgrimage tourism across India. While we are a young company, our founder built this on over 10 years of hands-on expertise in designing and managing meaningful journeys.
stats: Specialised in group-based pilgrimage tours, especially Char Dham Yatra
Planned operations to serve 800+ devotees in the 2026 season
whoWeAre.outro: Every journey we design is backed by learning, ground experience, and on-field execution.
